case_title: MARY JANE GALBISO VS. TODD VARNEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY JANE
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY JANE AS TO DEFENDANT VARNEY, TODD
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY JANE SERVED AUG-01-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VARNEY, TODD
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT VARNEY, TODD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY JANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARNEY, TODD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 ANDERSON ST. (NEAR BEDROOM, UPPER PORTION OF STRUCTURE), S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY JANE AS TO DEFENDANT VARNEY, TODD DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
